_comment: project-builder composes atoms into a complete DIY project brief. Shortcut atoms let the creator request just a materials list or just step sequence.
description: Complete DIY home decor project brief: snapshot, materials, steps, safety, styling variants, and renter alternatives.

steps.note: for a build touching residential construction (framing, decks, stairs, foundations, roofing), pull dimensions and quantities from construction-lookup and build-calc (board feet, stair math) rather than estimating

for construction steps, use construction-lookup for the required sequence and common mistakes and code-lookup for the governing section and adopted FL/NC edition; carry the citations and the boundary through

steps.condition: renter_friendly requested or step has permanent modification

note: The user can call any shortcut atom directly without running the full workflow. step-sequence always invokes the licensed-trade safety check per protocols/safety.md. For residential construction facts (dimensions, code-cited steps, calculations), project-builder consults the construction-desk atoms construction-lookup, code-lookup, and build-calc rather than estimating; their citations and the verify-locally boundary carry through into the brief.
